title: Update AdTechFX to use RCFX Impressions
note: This update will improve AI's understanding of AdTechFX & bring its attribution more in line with other channels.

title: AdTechFX AI Insights
note: Highlight specific stats or findings from active campaigns.

title: Remy for AdTechFX
note: Ensure that Remy gives accurate responses for AdTechFX and is available on AdTechFX Results pages.

title: 7-day Attribution Window
note: Give AdTechFX attribution if no other paid channel before conversion.

title: Attribution Activation Toggle
note: Prevent AdTechFX attribution from starting before the campaign begins in TTD

title: Exclude customers from ABR/ABM ICP campaigns
note: ABR & ABM ICP campaigns send data directly to TTD from PDL, bypassing C360FX & saving clients prospecting credits. We want to start comparing these contacts with client customers & excluding those contacts from campaigns.

title: Limit CRM-Retargeting Attribution Window to match client sales cycles
note: AdTechFX should not receive credit if a deal is won well beyond the end of the client's normal sales cycle.

note: Update the AdTechFX Settings to be a
that shows the history of your campaigns via the Archive.

title: ABM Campaign Builder via Spreadsheet Upload
note: Add the ability to upload a company spreadsheet to find contacts for my ABM Campaign.

title: Inventory Performance Reporting
note: in the RCFX UI for each campaign/campaign type. Include logos and the total number of impressions for each platform
